calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-03-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Gerardo Martin, a/k/a Gerardo Martin Arellano, individually and dba Fremont Square Cleaners.
Default entered against defendant on March 18, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on March 18, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at Default Prove-Up hearing was filed on April 25, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant: Gerardo Martin, a/k/a Gerardo Martin Arellano, individually and dba Fremont Square Cleaners as follows:

Damages/Principal - $38,101.57.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,359.80.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $390.00, for a total of $42,351.37.

Additionally, plaintiff Bank of the West is deemed the owner of the leased equipment set forth in the judgment, and is entitled to immediate possession of said equipment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
